channel.title: Problem with wordpress (contact-us) use (-) (dash) in link
channel.description:
Hi,
I want to know another thing that in wordpress if there is link of page which contain "-"(dash) like (contact-us) then frontity is not working . Please help regarding this issue that how i can solve this issue.

item.title: Problem with wordpress (contact-us) use (-) (dash) in link
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @letternanda

I cannot reproduce this issue. Links with dashes in work fine in my test environment. Can you provide more information about the issue you’re experiencing.

In order to provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible, can you please provide the info suggested here?

The more info you provide about your issue the better. Providing a repo or code-sandbox with your code is especially helpful to find solutions of technical issues with specific code.

Read full topic
item.source: Problem with wordpress (contact-us) use (-) (dash) in link

item.title: Problem with wordpress (contact-us) use (-) (dash) in link
item.dc:creator: letternanda
item.description:
Hi,

I want to know another thing that in wordpress if there is link of page which contain “-”(dash) like (contact-us) then frontity is not working . Please help regarding this issue that how i can solve this issue.

Read full topic
item.source: Problem with wordpress (contact-us) use (-) (dash) in link
